title: cyclosorus hudsonianus
intro: Cyclosorus hudsonianus, also known as the Hudson's fern, is a species of fern that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Cyclosorus hudsonianus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. This plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Cyclosorus hudsonianus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional medicine for its wound-healing properties and to treat skin conditions.
